death.attack.dark: %1$s's very essence was devoured by the shadows
death.attack.shadow: %1$s was undone and returned to the void
death.attack.frenzy: %1$s succumbed to the Unbridled Rampage and was annihilated.
Target found at:: The Demon's Gaze is upon you:
dark1: Ancient whispers are reshaping your very bones...!
dark2: Your skin crawls with the surging, pent-up force of the abyss.
dark3: THE CONTAINMENT FIELD IS FAILING! The breach is imminent!
dark4: The summoned shadows hearken only to their god, their grip tightening!
cantfind: If you gaze long into an abyss, the abyss also gazes into you, mortal.
